languages.text: "Подкрепление, отправленное родом Гапрак, исчезло на подходе к резиденции. Вам известны подробности?"
languages.translation_comment:
[blueprint] играет DL_KnowGaprakPass и не играет DL_GaprakMask
не играет DL_KnowJuvennaIntrigue

languages.text: "The reinforcements sent by House Gaprak disappeared on the approach to the residence. Do you know anything more about it?"
languages.original_text: "Подкрепление, отправленное родом Гапрак, исчезло на подходе к резиденции. Вам известны подробности?"

traits.locale_text: "The reinforcements sent by House Gaprak disappeared on the approach to the residence. Do you know anything more about it?"
"The reinforcements sent by House Gaprak disappeared on the approach to the residence. Do you know anything more about it?"
"The reinforcements sent by House Gaprak disappeared on the approach to the residence. Do you know anything more about it?"

languages.text: «Los refuerzos de la casa Gaprak desaparecieron al acercarse a la residencia. ¿Sabe algo más al respecto?».
languages.original_text: "The reinforcements sent by House Gaprak disappeared on the approach to the residence. Do you know anything more about it?"

traits.locale_text: «Los refuerzos de la casa Gaprak desaparecieron al acercarse a la residencia. ¿Sabe algo más al respecto?».

languages.text: “贾帕克家族派来的援军在前往官邸的途中失踪了。这事你还知道些什么吗？”
languages.original_text: "The reinforcements sent by House Gaprak disappeared on the approach to the residence. Do you know anything more about it?"

traits.locale_text: “贾帕克家族派来的援军在前往官邸的途中失踪了。这事你还知道些什么吗？”

languages.text: « Les renforts dépêchés par la maison Gaprak ont disparu alors qu'ils approchaient de la résidence. Savez-vous quoi que ce soit à ce sujet ? »
languages.original_text: "The reinforcements sent by House Gaprak disappeared on the approach to the residence. Do you know anything more about it?"

traits.locale_text: « Les renforts dépêchés par la maison Gaprak ont disparu alors qu'ils approchaient de la résidence. Savez-vous quoi que ce soit à ce sujet ? »

languages.text: "Gaprak Hanesi tarafından gönderilen takviye kuvvetleri, konuta yaklaşırken ortadan kayboldu. Bu konuda daha fazla bir şey biliyor musunuz?"
languages.original_text: "The reinforcements sent by House Gaprak disappeared on the approach to the residence. Do you know anything more about it?"

traits.locale_text: "Gaprak Hanesi tarafından gönderilen takviye kuvvetleri, konuta yaklaşırken ortadan kayboldu. Bu konuda daha fazla bir şey biliyor musunuz?"

languages.text: "Die von Haus Gaprak entsandte Verstärkung ist auf dem Weg zur Residenz verschwunden. Wisst Ihr mehr darüber?"
languages.original_text: "The reinforcements sent by House Gaprak disappeared on the approach to the residence. Do you know anything more about it?"

traits.locale_text: "Die von Haus Gaprak entsandte Verstärkung ist auf dem Weg zur Residenz verschwunden. Wisst Ihr mehr darüber?"

languages.translation_comment:
[blueprint] играет DL_KnowGaprakPass и не играет DL_GaprakMask
не играет DL_KnowJuvennaIntrigue

languages.text: 「ガプラク家の補強兵は、邸宅への接近中に消えてしまいました。何かご存知ですか？」
languages.original_text: "The reinforcements sent by House Gaprak disappeared on the approach to the residence. Do you know anything more about it?"

traits.locale_text: 「ガプラク家の補強兵は、邸宅への接近中に消えてしまいました。何かご存知ですか？」
